question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

shellCommands: "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"export function useAppStateValue|export function useOnAppStateChange|class AppStateObserver|public flush\\(\" packages/excalidraw/hooks/useAppStateValue.ts packages/excalidraw/components/AppStateObserver.ts"

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "export class API|class UI|class Pointer" packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/api.ts packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/ui.ts'
graph.answer:
Here’s the runtime chain I’d use for a first behavior change:

```text
<Excalidraw> export
  -> ExcalidrawBase in index.tsx
     - normalizes props/options
     - installs polyfills
     - wraps providers
     - passes callbacks/API into App
  -> App constructor
     - creates App state, Scene, Store, History, Renderer, ActionManager
     - creates the imperative API object
  -> componentDidMount
     - wires listeners and store/history subscriptions
     - initializes the scene
     - emits mount/initialize callbacks
  -> initializeScene
     - restores initialData / initialState
     - resolves viewport
     - syncs scene + appState into Store/History/Scene
  -> render
     - builds LayerUI + StaticCanvas + InteractiveCanvas
     - passes pointer handlers into the canvas
  -> pointer handlers
     - handleCanvasPointerDown
     - onPointerMoveFromPointerDownHandler
     - onPointerUpFromPointerDownHandler
     - these drive updateScene, actionManager, and Scene mutations
```

The important code anchors are:

- The public export is [`packages/excalidraw/index.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx#L67), where `ExcalidrawBase` lives, and [`packages/excalidraw/index.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/index.tsx#L310), where `Excalidraw` is memoized.
- The imperative API is created in [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L792) and exposed from mount in [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L3273).
- `App` is the core runtime shell in [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L651).
- Scene restore happens in [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L2950).
- Mount/listener wiring is in [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L3183).
- The render tree is built in [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L2139).
- The main write path is [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L4717).
- Pointer input starts in [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L7997), then continues through [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L10028) and [`packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/App.tsx#L10951).

If you are about to change behavior, these are the adjacent paths to read next:

- For mount/API/lifecycle changes: [`packages/excalidraw/tests/packages/events.test.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/packages/events.test.tsx#L13)
- For public hook behavior: [`packages/excalidraw/hooks/useAppStateValue.ts`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/hooks/useAppStateValue.ts#L70) and [`packages/excalidraw/components/AppStateObserver.ts`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/components/AppStateObserver.ts#L183)
- For import/drop/app-state restoration: [`packages/excalidraw/tests/appState.test.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/appState.test.tsx#L16)
- For hook subscription semantics: [`packages/excalidraw/tests/appStateHooks.test.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/appStateHooks.test.tsx#L43)
- For drag-to-create behavior: [`packages/excalidraw/tests/dragCreate.test.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/dragCreate.test.tsx#L37)
- For selection and box-select behavior: [`packages/excalidraw/tests/selection.test.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/selection.test.tsx#L62)
- For undo/redo and scene capture: [`packages/excalidraw/tests/history.test.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/history.test.tsx#L120)
- For mermaid/text-to-diagram UI behavior: [`packages/excalidraw/tests/MermaidToExcalidraw.test.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/MermaidToExcalidraw.test.tsx#L106)
- For export/render pipeline behavior: [`packages/excalidraw/tests/scene/export.test.ts`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/scene/export.test.ts#L30)
- For startup edge cases: [`packages/excalidraw/tests/App.test.tsx`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/App.test.tsx#L12)

The test harness files you’ll keep seeing are:

- [`packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/api.ts`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/api.ts#L68)
- [`packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/ui.ts`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/ui.ts#L182)
- [`packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/ui.ts`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/excalidraw/packages/excalidraw/tests/helpers/ui.ts#L449)
